arts.ttl: Inter’s Mkhitaryan: “We want the Champions League final and the Scudetto”
arts.sum: Inter Milan midfielder Henrikh Mkhitaryan recently gave an extensive interview to Corriere della Sera, discussing various aspects of his life on and off the pitch, as well as setting future goals for the Nerazzurri club. The Armenian player started by explaining the meaning of his surname, which in Italian translates to “consolation, comfort.” He then reflected on Inter’s Champions League final appearance last season, expressing confidence in the team’s ability to reach that stage again. “Everyone thought City would score four goals against us, but we played very well and deserved to draw and even win. arts.ttl: Inter’s Belahyane watch: A potential derby with Milan on the horizon
arts.sum: As the international break concludes, Inter Milan’s attention turns to their upcoming Serie A fixture against Hellas Verona. While Simone Inzaghi prepares his squad for Saturday’s kickoff, the club’s sporting directors Ausilio and Baccin have their sights set on a different target: Reda Belahyane, Verona’s promising Moroccan midfielder. Calciomercato report how the 20-year-old Belahyane has been catching the eye of several Serie A clubs, with Inter Milan showing particular interest in recent weeks. Sean Sogliano’s latest discovery for Verona has impressed with his performances, showcasing remarkable character and technical ability despite his modest physical stature. arts.ttl: Relief for Inter: Calhanoglu’s medical tests reveal no Injury
arts.sum: Inter Milan can breathe a sigh of relief as Hakan Calhanoglu’s medical tests have come back negative, revealing no muscle injuries. The Turkish midfielder underwent examinations this morning at a clinic in Rozzano, putting to rest the concerns that had been lingering for the past couple of days. This news comes as a welcome development for manager Simone Inzaghi, who had already been reassured by Calhanoglu himself following the discomfort experienced during his first match with the Turkish national team. Moving forward, Calhanoglu will gradually resume training.
